sessions.summary: Hardened /wrap skill with two-phase architecture and created /backlink-enrich skill
accomplishments: Restructured /wrap to two-phase: mandatory ENTITIES/FACTS extraction block before file writes
Ran LLM Council: proved declarative rules lose to LLM prose defaults — structural constraints needed
Added quality gate at bottom of skill file with wrong/right examples and mechanical test
Ran second LLM Council: proved backlink enrichment belongs in separate skill with queue pattern
Created /backlink-enrich skill: queue-based, human approval gate, idempotency guard, 14-day scope
Validated approach: manual false-positive test on 3 entities showed <10% rate
nextSteps: Test /wrap in a real SAP session to validate full flow
Run /backlink-enrich once to validate queue→approval pipeline

sessions.summary: Farm Manager 2026 strategy session — updated equipment and ops philosophy
accomplishments: Decided Mega Yield 4000 (50 ha/h, $5M) for Shnoozy Pitman, replacing 3x FieldKing 750
Updated Obsidian note: cash $15M, batch ops strategy, 7x GrainForce 9000 at Buzzing Grass Dam
Strategy shift captured: one tool at a time (no stacking) + crop diversification

sessions.summary: Full analysis of Application Upgrade feature in ApplicationService — published wiki page
accomplishments: Scanned ApplicationUpgradeTool.cs (~2900 lines) — identified 12 abilities, 10 limitations
Documented conflict types, feature flags, prerequisites, and full upgrade flow
Published comprehensive wiki page under Features Design in GIGYA space
Added 8 feature-wise + 8 technical design improvement recommendations

sessions.summary: Built cdp-kibana-mcp server, rewrote investigation skill to parallel-first, investigated EC group sync
accomplishments: Built cdp-kibana-mcp MCP server — headless Kibana/ES queries via HTTP, VPN-only auth
Discovered Kibana needs only VPN (no SSO) — eliminated cookie/browser dependency
Ran LLM Council on plugin improvement — unanimous: parallel-first replaces sequential tracing
Rewrote SKILL.md: Phase 0 pattern match, Phase 1 parallel scan, Phase 2 targeted deep dive
Auto-save now mandatory — findings pushed to knowledge base without confirmation
Investigated EC Connector group sync: account schema not acked, groups dropped silently
Found pspanID trace diagnostic for CDFLDispatcher ack gate messages
PRs #32 and #33 merged to cdp-connectors-marketplace main
nextSteps: Enable Corporate Account API on EC connector app for group sync
Test plugin on a fresh unknown issue to validate parallel-first
